description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a stealth-inspired design, featuring a sharply pointed nose and a faceted, low-profile fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the body, giving it a delta-like appearance with pronounced anhedral angles. The surface is predominantly matte black with subtle accents of dark gray and hints of blue and green, suggesting a radar-absorbing material. The cockpit is forward-mounted with a faceted, tinted canopy, and the rear section houses two prominent exhaust ports, indicating jet propulsion. The landing gear is minimal, with small wheels visible under the fuselage. The overall form is compact and optimized for low observability, resembling advanced military aircraft.
description: A stealthy, angular black airplane with swept-back wings, a forward cockpit, and twin rear jet exhausts. Its faceted surfaces and minimal landing gear evoke a modern, low-observable military jet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, angular cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with pronounced anhedral angles.
description_view_1: Left-front perspective highlights the faceted canopy, sloped fuselage, and the small landing gear beneath the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin jet exhausts and the integrated, angular tail surfaces.
description_view_3: Right-rear perspective displays the wing sweep, rear exhausts, and the subtle surface details along the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with pronounced anhedral angles and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines with visible exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a canted, V-tail configuration integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with small, retractable nose and main wheels.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a faceted, tinted canopy.
